patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,8 @@
 
 > **AI Handoff Protocol**: AI-to-AI dispatch packets (Planner / Executor / Reviewer with human arbitration) follow the append-only governance protocol in [`ai_handoffs/AI_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md`](ai_handoffs/AI_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md). Templates: [`ai_handoffs/templates/`](ai_handoffs/templates/). The protocol is now also runtime-automated: `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1` orchestrates one bounded dispatch (Codex plans / Claude executes / Codex controls, with Claude's `GATE_VERDICT` plan-gate marker and `EXEC_STATUS` / `EXEC_PACKET` execute markers driving control flow), and `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` is the GitHub issue queue runner — it pulls the oldest open `ai-dispatch`-labelled issue, runs it through the loop on a per-issue `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-<n>` branch, writes a timestamped `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` audit file, and auto-publishes only when the loop exits 0 and Codex control says `pass`; failed or blocked runs remain local and are labelled failed. The recurring `/loop` queue cadence is semi-attended and bound to the local authenticated CLI session, not a headless cloud daemon — see [`AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md`](AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md). The packets themselves remain a documentation convention, not a replacement for ADRs / `Status.md` / `HANDOFF.md` / `change.md`. Precedent files at the repo root (`OPENAItoCLAUDE_*.md`, `CLAUDEtoOPENAI_*.md`, `CLAUDE_SUB_EPSILON_REVIEW.md`) remain valid historical records and are not migrated.
 
+> **Snapshot**: 2026-06-02 (MENUBAR-RECONCILE-DRAINTEST — the File menu bar is now FUNCTIONAL, superseding the "menu-entry wiring … still open / keyboard-only" note in the 2026-06-01 snapshot below): #287 (MENUBAR-FILE-SUBSTRATE, `69b33e6`) added a host File menu bar (Open / Save / Save As New Project) that enqueues `editor_ui::menus::Command` onto a host→shell FIFO `MenuCommandHandoff`; #288 (MENUBAR-FILE-WIRING, `7979f8b`) wired `editor-shell` to drain it at the TOP of `render_frame` and route each Command ONE-WAY into the existing `handle_open_request` / `handle_save_request` / `handle_save_as_new_project_request`. So the Open / Save / Save-As authoring loop is now DISCOVERABLE AND FUNCTIONAL from the File menu, not keyboard-only (the `Ctrl+O`/`Ctrl+S`/`Ctrl+Shift+S` paths are unchanged). This dispatch (MENUBAR-RECONCILE-DRAINTEST) also added a `render_frame` drain-placement test (editor-shell) and corrected the stale `EguiHost::render` rustdoc. STILL DEFERRED (narrowed): the `MenuRegistry::resolve` data-driven dispatch (the W08 registry) — the File bar is a direct host menu bar (`egui::MenuBar::new().ui`) over a hardcoded item list, `Command::OpenFile` still carries only a diagnostic id, and Edit/View/Play menus + accelerators + plugin menu entries remain unbuilt (the wire-vs-ratify decision is the named next frontier). Unchanged/out-of-scope: the non-Open/Save audit edges (drag-drop ingestion, `io-image` consumption, the World-only Command-Bus `Action` context). Forward-only: prepended above the 2026-06-01 snapshots; no prior entry rewritten.
+
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-01 (SAVEAS-STATUS-SNAPSHOT — Save-As to a NEW `.rge-project` tree landed (#283 substrate + #284 wiring); forward-only follow-up to the STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE snapshot below). That snapshot (and the `plans/BASELINE.md` 2026-06-01 "Editor-usability preflight" subsection) recorded **Save-As to a *new* `.rge-project` tree** as still **carried/deferred** — accurate as of its grounding (`f76e001`), now superseded. **Shipped, grounded at `a74e479`:** substrate `rge_scene_loader::save_world_as_new_project` (creates `<dir>/.rge-project` + `<dir>/scenes/main.rge-scene` from the live world; folder-derived manifest `name`, `V0_1_0`, `[Desktop]`, `scenes: ["scenes/main.rge-scene"]`; **no-clobber** if either path exists; round-trips via `load_scene_world_from_path`; #283) + wiring **`Ctrl+Shift+S`** = `EditorKeyCommand::SaveAsProject` → `EditorShell::handle_save_as_new_project_request` over binary-owned `NewProjectSaveDialog` (rfd `pick_folder`) + `NewProjectSaveHook`, adopting `SaveSource::Project { path, name: folder-derived (None if non-UTF-8) }` + mark-saved (#284). editor-shell stayed loader-free (`forbidden-dep` rule 7). **The editor now has the full authoring loop: Open (Ctrl+O) / Save (Ctrl+S — scene or project, silent) / Save-As new project (Ctrl+Shift+S).** **Still open — NOT closed here:** menu-entry wiring for Save-As (no functional `MenuRegistry::resolve` dispatch); a last-directory-memory dialog; non-empty-folder confirmation; the non-Open/Save audit gaps (drag-drop, `io-image`, World-only Command-Bus `Action` context) stay as the 2026-05-28 ISSUE-256 entry records. **Forward-only:** the P2 snapshot below + every prior snapshot + the 2026-05-11 one-page summary pillars are byte-identical; this prepends the Save-As update only.
 
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-01 (STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE — editor in-app Open/Save surface (#264–#281) forward-only reconciliation, IMPLEMENTED via the `ai_handoffs/` manual dispatch protocol — TASK → EXEC → REVIEW → CLOSEOUT). The in-app file **Open/Save** authoring loop shipped across the contiguous PR run **#264–#281** but never reached these state docs (last reconciled at ISSUE-256 / `7472467`, before #264), which still framed **SAVE as "no path at all"** and **in-app Open as "absent."** Both are now stale. **Now shipped, grounded at `f76e001`:** in-app **Ctrl+O** scene Open (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/open_request.rs::handle_open_request`, #266) over the `EditorShell::replace_world` world-swap (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs:753`, #265) and the scene-path resolver promoted into `rge-scene-loader` (#264), with GLB-watcher teardown; **Ctrl+S** Save / Save-As (#268) writing `.rge-scene` (`rge_scene_loader::save_scene_world_to_path`, #267) and `.rge-project` (`save_project_world_to_path`, #273); **true Save** = silent overwrite of the opened source routed by `SaveSource` { Scene, Project } (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/save_source.rs`, #269 / #274, replacing `scene_source_path`); window title (#270) + bottom status bar (#271) + source-neutral status (`source_name` / "No file", #277); `SaveSource::display_name()` shows a project's manifest name, folder as fallback (#275 / #279, tests+prose #281); `MarkSaved`→`Save` rename (#278); `editor-shell` kept loader-free by `forbidden-dep` rule 7 + `editor-state-ownership` Part B revived (#280). **Still open — NOT closed here:** Save-As to a *new* `.rge-project` tree (carried/deferred); and the non-Open/Save audit gaps — menu-command execution, drag-drop, `io-image`, World-only Command-Bus `Action` context — stay exactly as the 2026-05-28 ISSUE-256 entry records. **Forward-only:** the 2026-05-11-grounded one-page summary pillars and every prior snapshot are byte-identical; this adds the Open/Save surface only. Detail: the `plans/BASELINE.md` "Editor-usability preflight (Phase 9)" 2026-06-01 subsection.

 2026-06-01 (SAVEAS-STATUS-SNAPSHOT — planning-substrate hygiene: Save-As to a NEW `.rge-project` tree landed (#283 + #284) forward-only snapshot, IMPLEMENTED via the `ai_handoffs/` manual dispatch protocol — TASK → EXEC → REVIEW → CLOSEOUT). Records that the carried Save-As feature shipped, superseding the "Save-As to a *new* `.rge-project` tree … remains carried/deferred" line in the 2026-06-01 STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE snapshot below (and the matching `plans/BASELINE.md` "Editor-usability preflight" 2026-06-01 subsection). Prepends a dated `### 2026-06-01 — Save-As to a NEW .rge-project tree landed (#283 substrate + #284 wiring)` subsection to `plans/BASELINE.md`'s "Editor-usability preflight (Phase 9)" section, immediately above the byte-identical `### 2026-06-01 — Editor Open/Save surface landed (#264–#281)` subsection; and prepends a parallel `> Snapshot: 2026-06-01` / `> **Snapshot**: 2026-06-01` blockquote to Status.md and HANDOFF.md above the STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE snapshot. **Shipped, grounded at `a74e479`:** substrate `rge_scene_loader::save_world_as_new_project` (#283 — creates `<dir>/.rge-project` + `<dir>/scenes/main.rge-scene`; folder-derived `name`, `V0_1_0`, `[Desktop]`, `scenes: ["scenes/main.rge-scene"]`; no-clobber if either path exists; round-trips via `load_scene_world_from_path`); wiring `Ctrl+Shift+S` → `EditorKeyCommand::SaveAsProject` → `handle_save_as_new_project_request` over binary-owned `NewProjectSaveDialog` (rfd `pick_folder`) + `NewProjectSaveHook`, adopting `SaveSource::Project { path, name: folder-derived (None if non-UTF-8) }` + mark-saved (#284); editor-shell loader-free (`forbidden-dep` rule 7). The editor now has the full authoring loop: Open (Ctrl+O) / Save (Ctrl+S) / Save-As new project (Ctrl+Shift+S). **Explicitly NOT closed (anti-over-claim):** menu-entry wiring for Save-As (no functional `MenuRegistry::resolve`); last-directory-memory dialog; non-empty-folder confirmation; the non-Open/Save audit gaps (drag-drop / `io-image` / World-only Command-Bus `Action` context) unchanged. **Docs-only, 0 code:** modifies `plans/BASELINE.md`, `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, `change.md` only; no in-place rewrite of any prior dated entry (pure prepend/insert); the 2026-05-11-grounded one-page summaries + the 2026-06-01 (#264–#281) entry byte-identical. **Verification:** `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` exit 0 (`VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.`, 10/10 architecture lints — Markdown-only change, no Rust touched); `git diff --stat` = exactly the 4 docs. **Three required references present in this entry:** `plans/BASELINE.md` new "2026-06-01 — Save-As to a NEW .rge-project tree landed (#283 substrate + #284 wiring)" subsection, the merged PRs #283 (`ede1a5b`) + #284 (`a74e479`), and `ai_handoffs/SAVEAS-STATUS-SNAPSHOT_TASK_2026-06-01_18-34-39+0300.md`.
 
+2026-06-02 (MENUBAR-RECONCILE-DRAINTEST — planning-substrate hygiene + test, via the `ai_handoffs/` dispatch protocol). Forward-only reconciliation that the File menu bar landed FUNCTIONAL (#287 `69b33e6` + #288 `7979f8b`), recorded into Status.md / HANDOFF.md / plans/BASELINE.md and here. #287 (MENUBAR-FILE-SUBSTRATE) added a host File menu bar (Open / Save / Save As New Project) enqueuing `editor_ui::menus::Command` onto a host→shell FIFO `MenuCommandHandoff` (bounded `VecDeque<Command>`); #288 (MENUBAR-FILE-WIRING) wired `editor-shell` to drain it at the top of `render_frame` and route each Command one-way into the existing `handle_open_request` / `handle_save_request` / `handle_save_as_new_project_request` (+ the forbidden-dep-validated `editor-shell → rge-editor-ui` edge). So Open/Save/Save-As are now menu-discoverable AND functional, not keyboard-only. This dispatch also: added a `render_frame` drain-placement test (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs`) closing the deep-audit's P2 gap (the four route tests called `drain_and_route_menu_commands` directly; none drove `render_frame`, so the load-bearing top-of-`render_frame` drain placement was structurally untested); and fixed the stale `EguiHost::render` rustdoc (which still called menu rendering a "future dispatch"). STILL DEFERRED (narrowed): the `MenuRegistry::resolve` data-driven dispatch (W08 registry) — the File bar is a direct host menu bar (`egui::MenuBar::new().ui`); Edit/View/Play menus + accelerators + plugin entries unbuilt (the wire-vs-ratify decision is the named next frontier). Provenance: the 2026-06-02 post-menu-arc read-only 5-axis deep audit (authority intact; no kernel-cavity pressure; this drained the lone Layer-1 status-doc lie + the P2 test gap). Docs + 1 test + 1 rustdoc; 0 production logic; 0 Cargo.toml. Gate: VERIFY OK 7/7 + 10/10 arch lints.
+
 2026-05-23 15:20:00 - REPO TRANSFER (operational, not a dispatch). Repository moved from `CADRust/RGE` to `RustCADs/RGE` to escape the exhausted Actions minutes on the CADRust org (3,000 min/month allotment hit, ~87% consumed by sibling `CADRust/RCAD` repo per metered-usage view). GitHub auto-redirects the old `CADRust/RGE` URL for ~1 year; local `origin` remote updated from `https://github.com/CADRust/RGE.git` to `https://github.com/RustCADs/RGE.git` via `git remote set-url` + `git fetch origin` + `git remote prune origin` (17 stale `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-*` remote-tracking refs pruned). **All carried over via transfer semantics**: ~130 issues (including the 100 `ai-auto`-labelled issues that ISSUE-128's cap-stop-state audit reached), ~30 PRs, all labels (`ai-auto` / `ai-dispatch-done` / `ai-dispatch-failed` / `ai-dispatch-retry` / `ai-dispatch`), releases, branches, tags, and all 6 GitHub Actions workflow definitions (Format check, Architecture lints, Workspace tests, Script bench compile, Supply chain (cargo-deny), CodeQL). **Visibility changed**: `CADRust/RGE` was flipped `private → public` mid-transfer because RustCADs free-tier policy required a public source for the incoming transfer; reverting to private at the new home is now an operator decision (not done in this commit). **CI verified executing** on RustCADs runners: the fmt rerun `#26332202630` on commit `2ce4404` completed `success` (was `completed/failure` on CADRust); CodeQL auto-triggered as `#26336370076` and progressed real steps with `runner_name: "GitHub Actions 1000000000"` populated and `steps_count: 10/11` recorded. This is the inverse of the ISSUE-100 (task #8) CI audit's documented "empty runner_name, 0 steps, ~2-second failure" pattern — that pattern is fully resolved on RustCADs because the org has its own Actions-minutes allotment uncoupled from `CADRust/RCAD`'s monthly burn. Reruns of `#26332202631` (Architecture lints), `#26332202627` (Workspace tests), `#26332202626` (Script bench compile), and `#26332202614` (Supply chain) all triggered cleanly within seconds — 3 of 4 had runners attached within 15 s, the 4th queued normally. **Freeze posture unchanged**: scheduler `RGE-AiDispatch` remains `Disabled`, `ai-auto` cap remains hard-frozen at 100 in both `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1` and `Register-AiDispatchSchedule.ps1` `[ValidateRange(1, 100)]`, no task #23 seeded, no autonomous work since #22 / ISSUE-128. **No script edits required**: dispatch automation scripts auto-detect repo slug via the `gh` CLI, so no `Invoke-AiDispatch*.ps1` / `Register-AiDispatchSchedule.ps1` / `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` / workflow-file edits were needed; the only operational change is the local `origin` URL plus this `change.md` entry. **Historical immutability preserved**: prior dated `change.md` entries — including the 2026-05-08 "first public commit pushed to CADRust/RGE on GitHub" record at line 672 — and all `ai_handoffs/` packets (TASK / EXEC / etc.) remain unedited as immutable historical records; they were accurate at the time and the GitHub redirect keeps their `CADRust/RGE` URLs resolvable. **Hard non-goals observed**: NO source / test / fixture / Cargo / lint / ADR / workflow / script / schema edits; NO dispatch packet rewrites; NO `ai-auto` cap change; NO scheduler re-enable; NO retroactive replacement of `CADRust/RGE` references in `ai_handoffs/` / `ai_dispatch_logs/` / earlier `change.md` entries. **Verification (docs-only gates)**: `git diff --name-only` lists exactly `change.md`; `git status --short --untracked-files=all` shows no untracked files; local `git fetch origin` resolves against `https://github.com/RustCADs/RGE.git` and `origin/main` HEAD matches `2ce4404`. Files modified (1 doc total): `change.md` (this entry appended; no rewrite of any prior entry, no edit to any other doc). **Three required references present in this entry**: GitHub commit `2ce4404`, GitHub Actions run `#26332202630` (Format check rerun on RustCADs/RGE), and `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-100_EXEC_2026-05-23_00-37-25+0300.md` (the original CI failure-boundary audit that diagnosed the empty-runner pattern this transfer resolves).

@@ -558,6 +558,25 @@ Until **at least one** of those fires, treat the reflection substrate as observe
 4. Cross-check the editor's call graph against the `CommandBus::submit` / `Action::apply` / `Action::revert` signatures to determine whether user-visible CAD mutations can flow through the existing bus.
 5. Test inventory across `editor-*` (`#[test]` count + integration vs unit breakdown + workflow coverage).
 
+### 2026-06-02 — File menu bar landed FUNCTIONAL (#287 substrate + #288 wiring)
+
+**Forward-only follow-up (MENUBAR-RECONCILE-DRAINTEST).** Supersedes the "Menu-entry wiring for Save-As … no functional `MenuRegistry::resolve` … keyboard-only" still-open bullet in the 2026-06-01 subsection below — the File **menu bar** is now functional. (The `MenuRegistry::resolve` data-driven registry remains separately deferred; see "Still open" below.)
+
+**Now FUNCTIONAL — the File menu bar.** End-to-end:
+
+- **Substrate (#287 MENUBAR-FILE-SUBSTRATE, `69b33e6`).** `editor-egui-host` renders a top File menu bar (Open… / Save / Save As New Project) that enqueues the existing `editor_ui::menus::Command` onto a host→shell FIFO `MenuCommandHandoff` (bounded `VecDeque<Command>`, cap 64, drop-newest; a deliberately different shape from the latest-only `Handoff<T>` slots).
+- **Wiring (#288 MENUBAR-FILE-WIRING, `7979f8b`).** `editor-shell` drains the FIFO at the **top of `render_frame`** (`drain_and_route_menu_commands`) and routes `Command::{OpenFile, Save, SaveAs}` **one-way** into the existing `handle_open_request` / `handle_save_request` / `handle_save_as_new_project_request`. Adds the `editor-shell → rge-editor-ui` dep (forbidden-dep-validated; both Tier-2). `Command::SaveAs` is labelled "Save As New Project" and routes to the new-project handler.
+
+So **Open / Save / Save-As are now discoverable AND functional from the File menu**, not keyboard-only (the `Ctrl+O`/`Ctrl+S`/`Ctrl+Shift+S` paths are unchanged). This dispatch (MENUBAR-RECONCILE-DRAINTEST) also added a `render_frame` drain-placement test (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs`, closing the audit's P2 gap that the four route tests called the drain directly without driving `render_frame`) and corrected the stale `EguiHost::render` rustdoc.
+
+**Still open — explicitly NOT closed here (narrowed):**
+
+- **`MenuRegistry::resolve` data-driven dispatch** (the W08 registry) remains deferred — the File bar is a **direct host menu bar** (`egui::MenuBar::new().ui`) over a hardcoded `file_menu_items()` list; `Command::OpenFile` still carries only a diagnostic id; **Edit/View/Play menus, accelerators, and plugin menu entries are unbuilt**. The wire-MenuRegistry-vs-ratify-the-FIFO-bypass decision is the named next frontier.
+- A last-directory-memory dialog; a non-empty-folder confirmation — unchanged.
+- The non-Open/Save audit gaps (drag-drop ingestion, `io-image` consumption, the World-only Command-Bus `Action` context) — unchanged.
+
+**Scope:** docs + one editor-shell test + the `EguiHost::render` rustdoc; no production logic / `Cargo.toml` change; the 2026-06-01 subsections and all earlier dated entries below are byte-identical (pure forward-only prepend).
+
 ### 2026-06-01 — Save-As to a NEW `.rge-project` tree landed (#283 substrate + #284 wiring)
 
 **Forward-only follow-up (SAVEAS-STATUS-SNAPSHOT).** The 2026-06-01 subsection below ("Editor Open/Save surface landed (#264–#281)") and its **Still-open** list recorded "Save-As to a *new* `.rge-project` tree (creating a fresh project directory) remains a carried/deferred item." That shipped; this prepend supersedes it. The subsection below is preserved **byte-identical** (no in-place rewrite). Grounded at main commit `a74e479`.
